calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2008 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Issuance Of Letter Of Request
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: John C. Brown, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: J2Global Communications; Mary Ann Wymore, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Protus IP Solutions

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff J2 Global Communications, Inc.'s Motion For Issuance Of Letter Of Request is denied as it is overly broad and as it seeks to undertake discovery prior to the service of summons on Defendant. The court does not find good cause to undertake the requested discovery prior to service upon Defendant. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Issuance Of Letter Of Request
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Continued To Aug-14-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612
